item.title: Kubernetes Environment Secrets
item.author: Author
item.description: Create Secret Secret If you want to know all of Secret, see this document Imperative Values with command 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 # Structure kubectl create secret generic <secret-name> --from-literal=<key>=<value> \ --from-literal=<key>=<value> \ --from-literal=<key>=<value> # Example kubectl create secret generic app-secret --from-literal=DB_Host=mysql \ --from-literal=DB_User=root \ --from-literal=DB_Password=paswrd Values from file app_secret.properties 1 2 3 DB_Host:mysqlDB_User:rootDB_Password:paswrd 1 2 3 4 5 # Structure kubectl create secret generic <secret-name> --from-file=<path-to-file> # Example kubectl create secret generic app-secret --from-file=app_secret.
